# CWE-91 positive: XML document assembled from user fields (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-91-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"encoding/xml"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-91 XML Injection
// Vulnerable line: user label concatenated into XML payload.
func ParseTicketXML(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	label := r.FormValue("label")
	detail := r.FormValue("detail")
	doc := fmt.Sprintf("<ticket><label>%s</label><detail>%s</detail></ticket>", label, detail)
	var parsed struct {
		Label  string `xml:"label"`
		Detail string `xml:"detail"`
	}
	if err := xml.Unmarshal([]byte(doc), &parsed); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "xml", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"label": parsed.Label})
}
